name: Nut Horns
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together butter, cream cheese, egg yolks, salt, and vanilla in a large bowl until smooth.
2. Gradually add flour to the mixture, stirring continuously until the dough is firm but still soft enough to roll out.
3. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 8 hours or overnight.
4. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
5. Prepare the filling: In a separate bowl, beat egg whites until stiff peaks form. Gradually add salt and sugar, beating well to incorporate air.
6. Mix in walnuts and vanilla extract until evenly distributed.
7. On a lightly floured surface, roll out the chilled dough to about 1/8 inch (3 mm) thick. Cut into squares using a sharp knife.
8. Place a dollop of filling on each square. Fold opposite corners together, overlapping slightly to form a horn shape.
9. Arrange the formed nut horns on an ungreased baking sheet, spacing them apart.
10. Bake for 15 minutes or until lightly golden brown and set.
11. Remove from the oven and let cool completely before serving.
